subject: feat(theme): auto-generate hex colors from DaisyUI oklch definitions
body:
Add build script (scripts/generate-theme-colors.mjs) that reads oklch
values from daisyui/theme/object.js and converts to hex via culori
(CSS Color Level 4 gamut mapping). Replaces manual oklch→hex conversion
that had incorrect values for out-of-sRGB-gamut themes (abyss was
significantly wrong — #6FE744 should have been #BEFF00).

Also adds runtime meta theme-color update in useTheme.ts so browser
chrome color changes when user switches themes.

- Build script reads from daisyui npm package (devDep)
- culori (devDep) for accurate CSS Color Level 4 gamut mapping
- npm run gen:theme-colors to regenerate after DaisyUI upgrades
- useTheme: updates both meta[name="theme-color"] tags on theme change
- Light themes use primary, dark themes use base200 for meta color

Tags: theme, pwa, build-script, colors
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-system
Semver: minor
